title: Cotton Client Commands
description: A client-side command API for Fabric mods
body:
> Note: CCC is deprecated and unmaintained. This page exists solely for archival reasons. For developing new mods that add client-side commands, see the corresponding APIs in Fabric API.

**Cotton Client Commands** is a library for Fabric mods that provides support for client-side commands.

CCC doesn't add any commands by itself. For information about the API, see [the Github page](https://github.com/CottonMC/ClientCommands).
